String.string: Задание провалено. Оно будет автоматически перезапущено через пару секунд.
Задание провалено. Телепортируйтесь из подземелья и повторите попытку.
Сначала вы должны выполнить все предыдущие задания.
Сначала вы должны выполнить хотя бы одно из предыдущих заданий.
[Вы выполняете максимальное количество заданий. Выполните часть заданий, чтобы освободить место в списке.]
Meet Keta at the deserted refugee tent in Fey Forest.
Collect blood from centaur insurgents near the deserted homestead.
Deliver centaur blood to Keta at the deserted refugee tent.
Deliver Keta's test samples to Maon in the Fey Forest.
Deliver faerie essence to Lillix at the Faevine Vale Camp in Fey Forest.
Use the antidote dart to detoxify Seravy in the northeast. Escort Seravy to the faerie pond [*Use when Seravy's HP is 30% or lower.*]
Bring the unicorn tear to Volos.
And tell him, "No excuses this time."
I sure hope you can help.
Deliver bridge repair tools to Weldon at Woodcutter Palisade.
That's a lot of timber. Thanks.
Gather the cut timber from the stacks near Woodcutter Palisade.
Deliver the cut timber to Weldon at the Woodcutter Palisade.
This well feed a lot of people.
Deliver the meat to Audburn at the Woodcutter Palisade.
Use the salt on the meat to cure it.
Now we've plenty to eat, and plenty to put up for later.
Go to Centurion Verus at the Woodcutter Palisade.
Use the barrel and salt to cure the meat.
Deliver the salted meat to Einna.
Those lousy, stinking yellow faeries! Those horrible, atrocity-filled vermin!
Look. Eastern way is safe now!
Kill redcaps and faeries. Collect their necklaces.
The deserted homestead is south of here.
Meet Balter at the deserted homestead.
Hunt nearby centaurs and centaur insurgents.
Now I can fell some trees.
Hunt the centaurs and centaur insurgents for their manes.
Thank you for avenging my father.
Kill Likhan the centaur in the southwestern part of the Fey Forest.
Report to Serra at the deserted homestead.
We must destroy them to get to the cabin.
Hunt the slinking sabertooths and collect their teeth.
Kill terrons on the way to Maon's cabin.
Ask Phonon where his father is.
Oh, I hope you can find them!
Thank you! I won't forget this!
Retrieve Phonon's beads from the hoglings.
Deliver the mushrooms back to Reindal.
Deliver the tools to Siravon at the Bridge near Faevine Vale.
Thanks to the tools you brought, I can do some work now.
Deliver the tools to Siravon at the Bridge near Faevine Vale.
Get my bridge parts back from those centaurs!
Retrieve the bridge parts from the centaurs.
Deliver the bridge parts to Niklas at the Faevine Vale Camp.
Something must be done about the rampaging faeries!
It's better this way, but still sad.
Eliminate the faeries around the Faevine Vale Camp and collect their swords.
Bring swords of Furious Faeries to Aeir in Faevine Vale Camp.
Hunt hulking sabertooths around Faevine Vale Camp.
Thank you for coming here to tell us.
Meet the faeries at the Faerie Pond.
It hurts to see their spirits corrupted.
End the suffering of the sullen and feral unicorns and collect their horns.
Deliver the unicorn horns to Aeir.
"I did what needed to be done."
Talk with Nemir at Aron's Camp.
Go to Nemir at Aron's Camp to the west.
Cut down the lumbering ghilliedhus, but do it with kindness.
Kill lumbering ghilliedhus on the way to Aron's Camp.
Find Jerelyn in the forest to the southwest.
Hunt jalmaraks and faeries until you recover Jerelyn's Necklace.
Hunt sporewalkers and terrons for the seals they carry.
Gather seals from the remains of sporewalkers and terrons.
Deliver the seals to Kadhim at Aron's Camp.
Have Lymei teleport you to the Woodland Path, then escort Himir to safety across the bridge.
Hunt slinking sabertooths in the Fey Forest.
Report to Reindal at Maon's Cabin.
Defeat centaurs in the Fey Forest.
Report to Balter at the deserted homestead when mission is complete.
Defeat unicorns in the Fey Forest.
Report to Aeir at the Faerie Pond when mission is complete.
On Time or Your Money Back
Last time I hire escorts in Cutthroat Harbor!
You've done us a solid favor, soldier.
Deliver the supplies to {@linkcreature:208#1034#Baidan} at Vanguard Post Alpha in the Hungry Caverns Vaults.
Deliver the supplies to {@linkcreature:208#1034#Baidan} at Vanguard Post Alpha in the Hungry Caverns Vaults.
Damned if I'll let them drive us out!
You cannibal cretins won't kill us that easily!
Fill the jug from the {@linkcreature:208#1038#clean well} in the Cavern of Shackles.
Fill the jug from the {@linkcreature:208#1038#clean well} in the Cavern of Shackles.
To my eyes, these stones are jewels and money!
Kill {@linkcreature:8#4031#skeletal caimans} and {@linkcreature:8#4031#bonethralls} in the Cavern of Tears and take their eyeballs.
We can't keep doing this alone! We need more bodies!
I don't know if even Kaia can help us if we can't get more bodies out here to help.
Remind {@linkcreature:62#1007$$Kasib} at {@Rgn:62001$$Cutthroat Harbor} that Raviv needs more soldiers.
Return to {@linkcreature:209#1007$$Raviv} at the {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost}.
I need to know he's okay.
Talk to {@linkcreature:209#1005$$Tryphena} at the {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost}.
Return to {@linkcreature:209#1012$$Glorine} at the {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost}.
I know! I'll cover myself in potent spices! Then I'll taste terrible...
Find {@linkcreature:209#1011$$Jascus} at the entrance of Azarel's Labyrinth.
Return to the {@linkcreature:209#1014$$crazy adventurer} at the {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost}.
I just hope we aren't too late.
By the way...don't spread this around.
You've arrived at the Advance Camp—but you're too late.
Go to the Advance Camp in Azarel's Labyrinth Depths.
Tell {@linkcreature:209#1005$$Tryphena} at the {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost} that Jascus is staying at his post.
Tell her I'm sorry I couldn't come myself.
Deliver the Notice of a Fallen Soldier to {@linkcreature:62#1023$$Wynne} in {@Rgn:62001$$Cutthroat Harbor}.
Don't go thinking this will be easy.
"Sailing with the wind at your back!"
What? A pirate can't want to do something nice?
The families will be so happy to see these things!
Find the locker in the {@Rgn:11006$$Pier Boundary}.
Find the locker in the {@Rgn:11006$$Pier Boundary}.
Find the locker in the {@Rgn:11006$$Pier Boundary}.
Find the locker in the {@Rgn:11006$$Pier Boundary}.
The Key to a Pirate's Heart
I don't even remember where I last saw it.
You're a pirate if I ever saw one!
Kill {@linkcreature:11#5006$$Lektor} and get Finn's lucky ship key.
Return {@linkcreature:62#1014$$Finn}'s lucky key to its rightful owner in {@Rgn:62001$$Cutthroat Harbor}.
This will buy us some time.
Good grog. Um, who were you again?
Thanks, but why is the sky spinning?
Tell {@linkcreature:62#1014$$Finn} that his crew has canceled.
We might all become slaves without Tairia leading.
Recover Kunchara's charms from the {@linkcreature:18#11#wheelwatch golems}.
Kill {@linkcreature:18#10#Sentinel Golems} and collect mana filters.
Wouldn't trust him any farther than I could throw him.
Find Regik in the northeastern Bleak Fields.
I'm glad you're on my side.
I'll take what I can get.
Kill the horned war hyenas and battle hyenas.
Deliver Regik's message to Elsta at Digory's farm.
(Wrap the metallic fragment in cloth and bring it along.)
Check the corpses in the area.
Retrieve the Free Brotherhood flag to the northeast.
Deliver the flag scraps to Erina.
I feel safer now that you're here.
Find Cregan. He went to spy on the golems.
Collect crystal hearts from the golems nearby.
Deliver the crystal hearts to Cregan at Harvester Fields.
It's just kind of creepy, you know?
Collect the destroyed pieces of fringed and demented scarecrows.
Deliver broken debris to Cregan at the Harvester Fields.
Visit Karadus at Lee's End Stead.
Kill the Lokians of the Free Brotherhood in their base.
Report to Karadus at Lee's End Stead.
Kill Free Brotherhood Lokians and collect their weapons.
Bring the blades to Karadus at Lee's End Stead.
Thank you, thank you so much!
Kill the Lokians and collect their tokens.
Speak to Yestin at Lee's End Stead.
Now these weapons are in good hands.
Retrieve the weapons from the weapon crates in the Free Brotherhood base.
Report to Nasha at Lee's End Stead.
We must learn of Sidurek's plan.
Follow the clues in the journal.
Find Sidurek's journal in the ruins north of the base.
Bring the weird orb back to Nasha.
Investigate the {@linkcreature:223#1051#scarecrows} on the Eldritch Academy Grounds for Wheelow.
Continue to investigate the {@linkcreature:223#1052#scarecrows} for Wheelow.
Look for one more {@linkcreature:223#1053#scarecrow} to complete your investigation for Wheelow.
Inform Wheelow about the condition of the scarecrows.
You investigate the cyclone. It appears harmless.
Investigate the blue cyclone in the Thaumaturge Chamber.
Let Casilyn know that the blue cyclone is safe.
Deliver Tarni's letter to {@linkcreature:222#1010$$Ania} on the Eldritch Academy Grounds.
Deliver the tasty basilisk eyeball soup to {@linkcreature:222#1007$$Keslyn} at the Eldritch Bastion Grounds.
Speak with {@linkcreature:68#1010$$Ronelyn} about resolving the royal dispute.
Tell {@linkcreature:224#1012$$Raquib} when you're ready to start.
You’ve reached Sandwalker Refuge. Hurry to the West Watchpost.
Reach Sandwalker Refuge within the time limit.
You’ve arrived at the West Watchpost. Talk to Loqa.
Reach the West Watchpost within the time limit.
Return to Torrent Outpost and talk with {@linkcreature:224#1012$$Raquib}.
Collect star essences and normetal ore, and deliver them to {@linkcreature:224#1008$$Elston}.
This area might have water. Use a dowsing rod.
Go to the possible water source.
This area might have water. Use a dowsing rod.
Go to the possible water source.
This area might have water. Use a dowsing rod.
Go to the possible water source.
You detect a large water supply deep underground.
Tell them to send soldiers if they need supplies
If you help us, everything will go smoothly
We need to get her out of here.
Look through the {@linkcreature:225#1036#Valkyon supply crate} at the {@Rgn:24012$$Crusader Camp}.
Look through the {@linkcreature:225#1036#Valkyon supply crate} at the {@Rgn:24012$$Crusader Camp}.
Look through the {@linkcreature:225#1037#Valkyon supply crate} at the {@Rgn:24012$$Crusader Camp}.
Deliver the cookies to {@linkcreature:225#1001$$Lilyenne} at {@Rgn:25004$$Vindicator Redoubt}.
Deliver the cookies to {@linkcreature:225#1001$$Lilyenne} at {@Rgn:25004$$Vindicator Redoubt}.
We’ve never skipped our birthday! Never!
{@Rgn:67001$$Popolion} Specialty Cookies! Just the thought of them makes my mouth water.
I don't have time for games.
I honestly don't know how to respond to that.
Tyvol arcanaliths are among the most potent.
Every Kiss Begins with an Ambush
That box is rather delicate. Please be careful.
Yes! Now I can get married.
Kill {@linkcreature:25#2091$$Lokian zealots} in the {@Rgn:25003$$Transepts} and recover the small box.
Collect sacred water from the {@Rgn:26005$$Fountain of Shara}.
I'm cold, hungry, and pissed. In case you couldn't tell.
For the federation. Always for the federation.
Talk to {@linkcreature:231#1008$$Pedr}, so {@linkcreature:231#1023$$Ghauth} doesn't lose his temper.
"Let's hope it doesn't come to that."
Report to {@linkcreature:231#1023$$Ghauth} at the {@Rgn:31008$$Glacial Bay Research Station}.
Bring me good news or I'll kill somebody. I swear it.
Get a weather forecast from {@linkcreature:231#1027$$Yasper} at the {@Rgn:31009$$Beacon Point Garrison}.
Tell {@linkcreature:231#1023$$Ghauth} what Yasper had to say.
It must have been a mirage.
Speak with {@linkcreature:231#1013$$Urwah} at the {@Rgn:31009$$Beacon Point Garrison}.
You don't see any incoming ships.
Find Urwah's lookout spot and look for the incoming fleet.
He's going to get himself killed out there.
Check on {@linkcreature:231#1020$$Bettenis}, who traveled north from Frost Wastes.
Pick a handful of dry grass.
Kill the frost queen {@linkcreature:31#28$$Siarxis} in the Icefang Inlet.
Report to {@linkcreature:231#1027$$Yasper} at the {@Rgn:31009$$Beacon Point Garrison}.
With reinforcements, we stand a chance.
Everybody's up against it right now.
It means a lot to me. Thanks.
Go to a {@linkcreature:73#1114#grave of an unkown soldier} in the cemetery near {@Rgn:73001$$Acarum}.
Place the flowers near the gravestone.
We're going to have a celebration.
Ask {@linkcreature:237#1032$$Eudon} about the history of the prions.
Take care when retrieving the heart.
I am eternally in your debt.
Kill Nyxarras, and bring its beating heart for Jerad.
Quickly deliver Nyxarras’s heart to Jerad.
Trezi needs to know my last wishes.
Deliver the letter to Trezi in {@Rgn:75001$$Frontera}.
[Chamber of Malice] Look for the soldiers in the Chamber of Malice.
[Coiling Transepts] Look for the soldiers in the Coiling Transepts.
[Chamber of Lost Souls] Look for the soldiers in the Chamber of Lost Souls.
[Depths of Corruption] Look for the soldiers in the Depths of Corruption.
[Camp Venom] Tell Tarna that you couldn't find her comrades.
Meet Sonakin at Pathfinder Post to receive battle supplies.
An ominous wind blows this way.
Head west from Darkquaver Garrison and retrieve the sensor from the magic detector.
Take the scan results to Cecera at Darkquaver Garrison.
They're just machines with a bad attitude. They will fall.
Warn Belok at Ceravin Point about the argon/Thulsa alliance.
Warn Winstail at Valumnir Outpost about the argon/Thulsa alliance.
[The Barbican] Deliver the infiltration report to {@LinkCreature:257#1023$$Kalraz}.
Wreckage by the Temple of Sikander
The carriage doesn’t have anything useful left in or around it.
Investigate the destroyed carriage.
Go to Jerelyn Ellin in the Liberty Plaza
Alkahest lets you enchant an item up to +6.
Enchant the provided rare weapon using the normal quality item.
Enchant the provided rare weapon using the uncommon quality item.
Find Surah at the Valkyon Headquarters in Velika.
Find Surah at the Valkyon Headquarters in Velika.
Find Surah at the Valkyon Headquarters in Velika.
Challenge the crucible, if you're brave enough.
Aim for a higher score next time.
Ask Vold to explain the challenge.
Eliminate the cyclops in the Crucible Bower.
Show the cyclops eye to Vold as proof.
Thank you for coming so far. Catch your breath, and then we'll talk.
Go to Allemantheia Headquarters and meet Fraya.
I told Jerad I'd send help. You are that help.
Go to Collegium Arcane and meet Jerad.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Speak to {@linkcreature:72#1450#Armis} to enter Malachai's Lab. Find the experimental journal.
Examine the book stand that appeared in the central hall of Malachai's Lab.
Deliver Malachai's experimental journal to Jerad.
Deliver Malachai's experimental journal to Jerad.
Go to Allemantheia Headquarters and meet Fraya.
Hurry! No one else can know that Thulsa was experimenting in Sirjuka Gallery.
Let me summon a teleportal to Sirjuka Gallery.
Go to Collegium Arcane and meet Jerad.
After speaking with Armis, go to Malachai's Lab and meet with Jerad.
Return to Allemantheia and speak to Jerad.
I'll follow as soon as I'm ready.
I thank you on behalf of Allemantheia and the High Elves.
Go through the Sirjuka Gallery teleportal and speak to Jerad.
Return to Allemantheia and speak to Jerad.
Go to Allemantheia Headquarters and speak to Fraya.
Slay the Free Traders executor in Fort Tulufan.
Slay the Free Traders executor in Fort Tulufan.
Adiar, the Free Traders executor, is under attack in Fort Tulufan! Defend him!
Slay the Enlightened Union executor in Fort Elenea.
Slay the Enlightened Union executor in Fort Elenea.
Derene, the Enlightened Union executor, is under attack in Fort Elenea! Defend her!
"It has been my honor to guard you."
Slay the Iron Order executor in Fort Dragonfall.
Slay the Iron Order executor in Fort Dragonfall.
Frateko, the Iron Order executor, is under attack in Fort Dragonfall! Defend him!
Report to the nearest guild quest coordinator.
Report to the nearest guild quest coordinator.
Check Jelena’s recommendation letter and go to Penrik.
Use a teleportal to enter Kezzel's Gorge.
Go to Georrif in Acarum and see what he knows.
Go to Ghufran in the Acarum Boneyard.
Activate the teleportal with the key scroll.
We should name the mountain after you.
Eliminate the guards in the lab
Eliminate Kaidun's former soldiers on Suryati's Peak.
Report to Tryphena at Relic Hunter Outpost.
This will not be easy, wingless one.
Enter the Ascent of Saravash and clear it out.
Report to Tryphena at Relic Hunter Outpost.
Kill Saravash and its argon lieutenants in Ascent of Saravash.
Report to Arkaius, Kaia's Sword Commander.
With Skulregnath's aid, Dagon's minions might actually raise him!
Report to Felion at Manafire Outpost.
Go to Mallon near the Raintree Oasis.
Take the scale to the teleportal.
We must eradicate every trace of Skulregnath.
This is the best news the province has had in ages.
Enter Sigil Adstringo and eliminate Skulregnath and its servants.
Enter Sigil Adstringo and destroy Skulregnath and its servants.
Bring the dragon fragments to Lethanial in Elenea.
Ask Feilia about the Cataclysm Machine. Return to Teldun to receive some Bailey Serum.
Go to Ebon Tower in the Vale of Spires.
Please check what's in the Special Dimension. You're the only one who can get to the truth
Thank you. I'll do my best not to betray your expectations
Enter the Special Dimension and defeat Nexus Ruler
Travel through the teleportal near Seren's Lake in Veritas District, then talk to Ukururu in Wonderholme (Normal).
Go inside Wonderholme (Normal) and defeat Bandersnatch and his men.
Enter Wonderholme (Normal) and defeat Bandersnatch and his forces.
Thank you for your efforts on behalf of the Mysterium.
Talk to Delegate Lena of the Mysterium.
Enter Wonderholme (Normal) and defeat Bandersnatch and his forces.
Thank you for your efforts on behalf of the Mysterium.
Talk to Delegate Lena of the Mysterium.
Enter Wonderholme (Normal) and defeat Bandersnatch and his forces.
Thank you for your efforts on behalf of the Mysterium.
Talk to Delegate Lena of the Mysterium.
Enter Wonderholme (Normal) and defeat Bandersnatch and his forces.
Thank you for your efforts on behalf of the Mysterium.
Talk to Delegate Lena of the Mysterium.
Talk to Delegate Lena of the Mysterium.
Use the {@linkcreature:29#1501$$teleportal} in the Timeless Woods to reach the Rift's Edge. Talk to Vandraul as soon as you arrive.
Enter the caves of the Rift's Edge, and defeat the monsters you find there.
Use the teleportal by the shipwreck on one of the south shores of the Jagged Coast to go to the Shattered Fleet.
Use the bridge to cross to the next ship.
Go through the broken wall and swim across to the final ship.
Enter Channelworks via the teleportal in Veritas District.
Use the {@linkcreature:3#1000$$teleportal} to access Lakan's Prison and talk to the scout.
Use the {@linkcreature:204#1601$$teleportal} in Fyrmount to reach the Abscess.
Use the {@linkcreature:203#1502$$teleportal} in Deva Silva to access the Ghillieglade.
Protect the injured Gatekeeper until it destroys all the coercive shards. Then, go to the Guardian's Plaza, or carry on straight to Banyakas's Sanctum.
Protect the recovering Guardian until it destroys the hypnotic stone. Then make your way to Banyakas’s Sanctum.
Free Banyakas from the influence of the Dominolith.
Report your victory to Surah at Velika Headquarters.
Report victory to Surah at Velika Headquarters.
Report victory to Surah at Velika Headquarters.
Report victory to Surah at Velika Headquarters.
Go take a look for yourself. We'll talk later.
I look forward to working with you again.
Report back to Rodrigo at Zulfikar Fortress on the Khanovar Front.
Option: Take the Candy and Run!
[Kumasylum] Win a match in Kumasylum again.
Use Instance Matching and complete a Blast From the Past dungeon again.
[Harvest Festival] We are short of taproots for making lunchboxes for Tuwangis. Please collect some taproots.
Complete the Vanguard Initiative order and claim your reward!
Complete Valkyon Scout's order and claim your prize!
Ambush Tomb Robbers Camp, give the robbers a lesson, and retrieve the stolen Ancient Gold Coins.
Complete Valkyon Scout's order and claim your prize!
Use Instance Matching and complete a Blast From the Past dungeon.
One scout said there is a secretive sanctuary where you can earn very special blessings. Go look for it.
Complete Valkyon Scout's order and claim your prize!
[Harvest Festival] Collect taproots for tuwangi lunchboxes.
[Wintera Snowfield] Seize victory in Wintera Snowfield.
